faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for Senior Resident posts at ABGH Delhi?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Senior Resident posts announced by Acharyashree Bhikshu Govt. Hospital Delhi.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply is the Walk-in Interview date, which is scheduled for 30-06-2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree (MD/DNB/DIPLOMA or equivalent in the concerned stream) and have 03 years of experience as a Junior Resident, with 02 years in the concerned department.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Resident posts is 45 years.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any relaxations in the age limit?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST candidates and 3 years for OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 67,700/- to Rs. 2,08,700/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the General/OBC category candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC category candidates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the ABGH Delhi Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Acharyashree Bhikshu Govt. Hospital Delhi, New Delhi - 110015.
